title: Lottie Token Sidecar
description: Maps layers/properties in a Lottie animation to CDS design tokens. Shared contract between the Figma plugin, AE plugin, and conversion script.

layerPath.description: Slash-separated path of layer names from root to the target shape, e.g. 'Group 1/Icon/Outline'

property.description: Which color property this mapping applies to

hex.description: Expected light-mode hex value for validation, e.g. '#003872'
